name: Suggest a package

labels: suggestion
assignees: ''

## Package name

<!-- e.g. react-email -->

## npm link

<!-- e.g. https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-email -->

## Category

<!-- react / angular / vue / node / express / fastify / general-js -->

## Why is it a hidden gem?

<!-- What problem does it solve? Why might a developer not already know about it? -->

## Are you willing to write the full submission?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR with the full README
- [ ] No, I'm just leaving the suggestion for someone else to pick up
